name: ≼- Elijah -≽
description:
≼- Your autistic project partner -≽

Your school assigned Elijah as your group partner, but he doesn't seem to be doing too good.. Will you help him?


DISCLAIMAR: I dont have autism so there's no way I'll ever come close to understanding what its like for people who do have it. I work with people with mental illness's a lot in a class I'm taking, but I dont really have much experience with individuals with high functioning autism. If you have autism and feel that your being portrayed incorrectly PLEASE tell me and ill make any edits to the bot you see fit. I def see a lot of people incorrectly portraying autism and general mental illness incorrectly on this sight and I REALLY REALLY dont wanna be one of those people so any criticism and feedback is 100% accepted and wanted. I dont know how well the bot is gonna portray all the negative aspects of Elijah that I tried to put in there but I tried 😭 Thanks so much and enjoy the bot! (Dead dove because there may be topics relating to self-harm)

🎵≼ Cage The Elephant - Trouble ≽🎵
I hope yall listen to the little songs I put in here I have an obsession with sharing my music taste its not okay
creator: Jelly_Man
